title: Video by theredmike
description: A presenter holding a branded "The Red Mike" microphone speaks to camera while walking through a daytime crowd on a tree-lined road. Cutaways show a stage with a banner reading "PEACEFUL PROTEST" and text naming Dharmendra Pradhan alongside the word "RESIGN", people holding Indian flags and placards, and an umbrella raised over the crowd. Posted 20 June 2026, a month before the 20 July march; the location shown is not independently confirmed. This is a media outlet piece rather than participant footage.

title: Cockroach Janta Party - क्रांति की गूँज दिल्ली में दस्तक दे चुकी हैं ...  और थोड़ी देर में सं...
description: A large crowd walks along a divided multi-lane road lined with trees and metal median railings, filmed from within the crowd. Indian tricolour flags are carried near the front; some participants raise a closed fist. Cars, an autorickshaw and a bus are visible at the roadside. The clip carries an overlay reading "Yuva Shakti Zindabad!!". Posted 20 July 2026; the specific road is not identified in the footage.

title: Cockroach Janta Party - गुलामी अगर आदत बन जाये तो आजादी सिर्फ एक सपना रह जाती है !  20 जुलाई ...
description: A daytime sit-in under yellow tarpaulin shelters. People sit on mats among spread-out books; one person massages another’s legs. A hand-lettered placard reads "1929 BHAGAT SINGH JAIL PROTEST" and a banner behind the group reads "HUNGER STRIKE DAY 20". Handwritten signs in Hindi and a "Writing Workshop" sign are propped among the books. A standing crowd watches from behind. The clip carries an overlay reading "1929 Yaad aa gya". Posted 18 July 2026.

title: Cockroach Janta Party - बेटी बचाओ बेटी पढ़ाओ !!  ऐसा बर्ताव तो नार्थ कोरिया में भी नहीं होता ...
description: Uniformed personnel in khaki with yellow helmets stand among a crowd at a green metal barricade. Several take hold of individuals in the crowd; one person is pulled across the barricade. In a later shot an officer swings a cane. A young man is then filmed speaking into a channel-branded microphone. Faces of both civilians and officers are identifiable. Overlay text in Hindi-English criticises the government. Posted 21 July 2026; the depicted events are consistent with the 20 July march but the date and location are inferred from the post, not independently confirmed.

title: Cockroach Janta Party - इनका अहंकार तो देखो जैसे देश के बच्चे कोई खिलौना हो , जो इनको इनके बा...
description: On a city street outside a building signed "Bank of Baroda", several men in civilian clothes hold and carry lathis (long canes); at least one uniformed officer is present in the same frames. People move and scatter across the road; some are seated on a kerb. The clip carries an overlay asserting "Fake police attack on public with no reason". What is visible is men in civilian dress holding canes alongside uniformed police; whether they are impersonators, plainclothes officers, or otherwise is not established by the footage, and the claim is publicly disputed. Marked context-unclear on that basis.

title: Video by realtaplu
description: Instagram reel posted by @𝗖𝗼𝗰𝗸𝗿𝗼𝗮𝗰𝗵 𝗝𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝘁𝘆 on 2026-07-20. Footage not yet reviewed or described; awaiting editorial review.

title: Video by sundaysarthak
description: Instagram reel posted by @Sarthak Goswami on 2026-07-21. Footage not yet reviewed or described; awaiting editorial review.

title: Video by natureofnagpur
description: A compilation clip overlaid with the caption "STUDENTS BLACK DAY, 20 July 2026." Opens on an empty road with a yellow barricade cart near a college gate as police move toward a crowd; a following shot shows a woman with a visible red mark on her shoulder, wearing a face mask, being helped by others. A later clip shows young people, including one in a striped jersey holding a green placard, standing near police in riot gear, with an on-screen caption reading "Hum apke bache nhi hai?" ("Aren't we your children?").

title: Video by filmyshit
description: An edited compilation with meme-style captions and music. Shows a crowd near a line of police visible through trees; a placard from a Shiv Sena-affiliated youth wing reads in Marathi "देशातल्या न्याय झाला पाहिजे!" ("there must be justice in the country"). Other clips show people massing near police under trees with umbrellas raised and an orange party flag held aloft. On-screen text overlays ("POLICE KO AAGE KARTA HAI!", "SORCERER") indicate editorial commentary rather than a straight, unedited clip.

title: Video by viepsa
description: First-person selfie video. The filmer, wearing eye protection and a wet cloth mask, says in Hindi that tear gas has been used again and that people have scattered ("फिर से टीयर गैस कर दिया। फिर से। ये सब लोग भाग गए हैं"). A following clip shows a close view of a reddened mark on someone's back under a white cloth with the on-screen caption "They just beat the living shit out of us," then a distressed woman with a cloth wrapped around her neck speaking directly to camera, saying in Hindi "बाहर आओ तुमको पता लगेगा कि तुम डेमोक्रेसी में नहीं रहते हो" ("Come outside, you'll find out you're not living in a democracy").

title: Video by womanwithopinions
description: Handheld footage from within a dense crowd pushing against and climbing over a yellow barricade stencilled "DELHI P[OLICE]"; people scuffle with personnel near the barricade while one person wipes the rail with a white cloth. An Indian tricolour and a saffron flag are held above the crowd. An earlier clip shows a person in a dark shirt and white trousers making a throwing gesture toward a line of personnel in light-blue uniforms near yellow-and-black roadside barriers.

title: Video by ankita.pahwa
description: Before/after style compilation. The first clip, captioned "*what we wanted to do*," shows a dense crowd of marchers filling a tree-lined street. The second, captioned "*what they turned it into*," shows the crowd pressed against a line of police at a barricade, people shouting and gesturing. The final clip shows a man sitting on the ground with a bleeding head wound being held upright by another person as bystanders look on.

source.uploader: Ankita | Sustainable Fashion, Clean Beauty & Life as it is | UGC

title: Video by sunny_trn_khediwal
description: Short clip captioned "Delhi Police ने मार मार कर सर फोड़ दिया" ("Delhi Police beat him repeatedly and split his head open"). Shows a young man sitting on the ground being attended to by others, one pressing a cloth to the back of his head, a small crowd gathered under a yellow canopy, and a bystander filming on a phone.

title: Video by kishhhh_20
description: Clip captioned "Media is hiding the truth. Watch the real story here!" Shows a man in a white t-shirt heavily stained with blood being supported and walked by two others through a crowd on a wide, tree-lined road, with onlookers gathered on a raised roadside berm in the background. A later clip shows people milling on a wet street.

title: Video by theharrykazama
description: A single continuous close-up selfie video filmed at night: a young man wearing glasses speaks at length directly to camera, captioned "Cowardly government." No crowd, march, or police are shown on screen; the clip is a first-person monologue rather than footage of the protest scene itself.

title: Video by aawaazunfiltered
description: Branded 'Awaz Unfiltered' compilation. Captioned "This Is How They Went," the first clip shows a column of marchers walking down a tree-lined road with fists raised. Captioned "This Is What They Got," the second shows people sitting or kneeling on the road while personnel in police/RAF uniform stand over them; a bystander hands a water bottle to someone seated on the ground.

title: Video by _meme_machiine_
description: Sideways-oriented clip showing a row of yellow police barricades along a street, thick haze drifting across the scene, and a building with a red digital sign visible behind trees. The uploader's caption reads "Delhi Police block metro NEET protest" and references Jantar Mantar.

title: Video by harsh.chawla14
description: A person holding a microphone stands facing a line of paramilitary/police personnel in camouflage uniform with riot shields, in front of a red-brick building. On-screen text quotes a source saying, "Police had no name badges & charged laathis on protestors."

title: Video by parth.mn1991
description: A man in a light green t-shirt with wet, disheveled hair speaks animatedly to someone off-camera near a tall black perimeter fence topped with barbed wire, a red sandstone-style building visible behind it. The uploader's caption describes him as "another protestor with blood on his tshirt" and places the clip at Jantar Mantar, Delhi. A second young man beside him has a mark on his forehead.

title: Video by sadhika_tiwari
description: A young man wearing a lav microphone speaks unsteadily to an interviewer while gripping his own shoulder, his hair wet, standing on a tree-lined path. The uploader's caption identifies him as a 16-year-old protester who was "lathi charged by Delhi police" and says he was shaking and in shock but refused to leave the protest site.

title: Video by rajbarodiyareel
description: A reaction/commentary clip responding to a screenshotted tweet claiming protesters ("Cockroaches") pelted stones at police and attacked them, justifying a lathi charge, shown alongside a News India TV screenshot reading (Hindi) "Clash at Jantar Mantar" over a CJP demonstration. The filmer, captioned "How can you be so predictable???", disputes the framing and re-shares a clip from another Instagram account showing men gathered near a parked van.

title: Video by harshdelhise
description: A person narrates to camera while walking along a colonnaded street resembling Connaught Place, with a line of RAF personnel in blue camouflage, helmets, and riot shields visible moving past in the background.

title: Video by sushil24_rajput
description: Nighttime footage captioned "JANTAR MANTAR PROTEST, 20th July (8pm)." A young man in a purple shirt shouts and gestures animatedly next to a parked motorbike amid a dense, agitated crowd; bystanders film on phones nearby.

title: Video by mukul.singh.chauhan
description: Split-screen clip: the top half shows a dense crowd around a man with a bleeding cut above his eye, someone pointing at the wound while others raise their fists nearby; the bottom half shows a man sitting in a car with a "PRESS" sign visible in the rear window, speaking to camera. The uploader's caption asks (Hindi), "What kind of crowd management is it to split someone's head open?"

title: Video by psycophilosopher
description: A screen recording of a news broadcast (studio anchor, split-screen with a fire truck and police at a scene) captioned (Hindi) "हिंसक प्रदर्शन में लगभग 50 पुलिसवाले..." ("In the violent protest, nearly 50 policemen [hurt]..."), followed by an indoor commentary segment in a room decorated with political posters, overlaying a Malcolm X quote about media framing ("If you're not careful, the newspapers will have you hating the people who are being oppressed, and loving the people who are doing the oppressing") while criticizing the coverage.

title: Video by boomlive_in
description: A BOOM fact-check explainer responding to a Delhi Police tweet that called a viral clip of "batons fitted with nails" fake and unrelated to the protest. BOOM says a forensic metadata check on the original file placed the recording at Gate No. 3, Janpath Metro Station with a timestamp of 20 July, and that its source (kept anonymous) confirmed attending that day's protest.
location: Janpath Metro Station, New Delhi, India

title: Video by cockroachjantaparty
description: A TV news clip, credited on-screen to Lokmat, showing a police officer inside a vehicle telling two young men "I will put 50-50gm powder in pocket if I see you again," captioned by the broadcaster as a cop threatening young protesters. The on-screen Marathi headline frames it as Mumbai police accused of behaving "like the British."

title: Video by disha_ramteke05
description: Night-time footage overlaid with the caption "Nagpur Police" showing a woman in a red outfit pinned face-down on the pavement while an officer's leg presses against her back; a second clip shows a crowd pressed against a metal shutter. Posted with the hashtags #nagpur and #savidhanchowknagpur.

title: Video by aanu_06_05
description: Footage filmed from behind a wall and tree line, overlaid with the text "Gundagardi At its Peak," showing riot police standing by parked buses amid haze on the road, with a large crowd visible further down the street. Posted with the hashtags #cockroachjantaparty #sonamwangchuk #jantarmantarprotest.

title: Baton charge and tear gas as protesters try to reach Parliament
description: Police brutality on protesters trying to reach sansad.

title: Delhi Police stand over injured protester as crowd shouts "They killed him"
description: This video shows delhi police beating a student protestor  during the peaceful protest demanding Dharmendra Pradhan's resignation due to paper leaks

title: "Who is the stone-thrower?" — street clash filmed from a distance
description: This video shows a clip from the 20th July protest where police started throwing stones at the peaceful student protestors

title: Witness account of police action at the 20 July protest
description: This video shows a media person telling the exact situation of what happened at the protest on 20th July 2026 and how the police became violent

title: Police detain a woman amid a crowd of security personnel
description: A woman is held and questioned by police officers, including a female officer, while a large group of paramilitary and Delhi Police personnel stand around her under trees near a building. On-screen text reads "Delhi Police Brutality".

title: Man confronts riot police behind a raised shield
description: A man in a green t-shirt gestures and appears to confront a line of riot police holding a transparent shield, amid scattered debris on a road; other officers and bystanders are visible nearby.

title: Aftermath on a barricaded street after a clash
description: Two men stand in a wet, debris-strewn street lined with yellow "Delhi Police" barricades, in what appears to be the aftermath of a clash; one gestures toward something off-frame.

title: Riot police advance along a street, filmed from above
description: Filmed from an upper-floor vantage point, a line of riot police in helmets and shields advances along a debris-littered street as a haze of smoke drifts through the air.

title: Riot police mass amid tear-gas haze
description: A dense group of riot and paramilitary police stand in a haze of tear gas or smoke, with a photographer visible among them.

title: Commentary clip: police scuffle under a tarp, captioned criticism
description: Two police officers appear to scuffle with a stick under a yellow tarp. Overlaid Hindi text criticizes police conduct toward women, invoking "Beti Bachao Beti Padhao" sarcastically.

title: Press interview questioning use of electric shocks on protesters
description: A woman is interviewed by a reporter and asked whether protesters were subjected to electric shocks; the clip carries an "Indian Express Hindi" logo and a captioned headline.

title: Woman climbs onto a car hood amid a crowd confronting police
description: A woman climbs onto the hood of a car bearing a Delhi registration plate amid a dense crowd, as a police officer stands nearby. A Hindi caption reading "डूब" appears on screen.

title: Content creator shows a bleeding head wound sustained at the protest
description: A man with a shaved head and beard shows a bleeding gash above his ear, with blood running down his face; on-screen text says this is how his "11 years of creating content" face-reveal happened.

title: Woman lies on the ground surrounded by people trying to help her
description: A woman lies on the pavement while several people attend to her, dabbing her face and holding a water bottle; on-screen text claims she is gasping for air after tear gas exposure.

title: Scuffle among police officers, captioned as criticism of police conduct
description: A group of police officers appear to jostle and argue with each other in a tense huddle; on-screen captions read "Is this incredible India" and "The behaviour of police in India."

title: Paramilitary personnel pull a woman near a bus as others try to hold her back
description: Paramilitary personnel in blue camouflage grab and pull a woman by the hair near a parked bus, while other women attempt to hold onto her and pull her back.

title: News footage: tear gas fired at protesters near Parliament
description: Aerial view of a large crowd enveloped in tear-gas smoke near Parliament; the clip carries a "the FUSIS INDIA" news outlet bug, a 7/20/2026 timestamp, and the headline "Horrific Visuals Emerge as Tear Gas Fired at Protesters Near Parliament."

title: News footage: female students dragged along the road by police
description: Police officers pull two women along the ground amid a crowd of security personnel and bystanders; the clip carries a "Samta News" logo and a caption stating female students were dragged on the road.

title: News interview with distressed witnesses, branded "Pyari Delhi 1 News"
description: A reporter for "Pyari Delhi 1 News" interviews two young women, one visibly distressed, on a tree-lined street; on-screen text reads "Doctor ki team."

title: Crowd gestures near parked cars at Jantar Mantar
description: A blurred, fast-moving shot shows people gesturing and running near parked cars on a street; an on-screen location tag reads "Jantar mantar" and the clip carries a "Nation X Live" news bug.

title: Injured student says "We are student not terrorist"
description: A young man with small cuts on his face and neck speaks to the camera; on-screen text reads "We are student not terrorist."

title: Woman recounts events to camera amid a crowd
description: A woman speaks directly into the camera, apparently recounting what she witnessed, with a crowd including several men gathered behind her.

title: Riot police line a wet street; caption reflects on "what I got in return"
description: Riot and Delhi Police personnel with shields and batons stand near a police vehicle on a wet street; red on-screen text reads "But what I got in return."

title: Young women rest on steps in the aftermath
description: Several young women sit and stand on a stone ledge, one holding a water bottle and a face mask, in a quiet moment away from the crowd.

title: Crying woman on the street; caption quotes an alleged police threat
description: A crying woman stands on a tree-lined street as a crowd walks by; on-screen text quotes an alleged threat ("...we'll take you to the station, strip you naked, and beat you") captioned "Beti Bachaao yaa Beti ko Peeto??"

title: News footage: claim that RAF personnel beat a student unconscious
description: Two men walk along a paved plaza past shops, one appearing to wear paramilitary-style clothing; the clip carries a "The Public Mic" logo and a caption alleging RAF personnel beat a student half-dead.

title: Distressed man recounts events, close-up
description: A visibly distressed man with curly hair speaks close to the camera, appearing to recount what happened to him.

title: Woman gives an account to camera indoors
description: A woman wearing glasses speaks to the camera in an indoor setting, away from the protest itself.

title: Caption alleges RAF personnel lack name plates and batch numbers
description: Paramilitary (RAF) personnel stand near yellow police barricades; on-screen text alleges they were seen at the protest without name plates or batch numbers.

title: Caption highlights a man's hand injury amid the crowd
description: A man raises an arm with a visible gash as bystanders record on their phones; on-screen text describes it as "a severe hand injury caught on camera" and says "No protest should end like this."

title: Injured woman sits as caption criticizes selective concern
description: A woman with a bruised shoulder and a face mask pulled down sits on the ground surrounded by others; on-screen text sarcastically says "I wish you did this much for the actual 'Terrorist'."

title: Crowd gathers near police; caption urges sharing before removal
description: A crowd of young people stands together on a street with police visible nearby; on-screen text urges viewers to "share this video before it's removed... to stay informed."

title: Crowd moves past a building; caption alleges children were beaten
description: A crowd of people moves quickly past a building with an awning; on-screen Hindi text claims children are being beaten "brutally," though the alleged beating is not shown in frame.

title: Smoke haze near police barricades on a Delhi street
description: A hazy cloud of smoke drifts over a tree-lined street lined with yellow Delhi Police barricades, with a police vehicle parked nearby.

title: Teenage boy sits near a wall
description: A teenage boy in a light-colored polo shirt sits near a wall marked with faded paint and graffiti, beside a parked scooter; no protest activity is visible in this clip.

title: Wet young man recounts events into a lapel mic
description: A young man with wet hair speaks into a lapel microphone on a tree-lined street, with a police vehicle visible behind him.

title: Caption alleges Delhi Police injured a 16-year-old at Jantar Mantar
description: A man wearing a cloth head wrap speaks to camera near a barricaded gate at Jantar Mantar; on-screen text alleges Delhi Police "split open the head" of a 16-year-old at the protest and accuses the government and police of tyranny.

title: Man gives an account near Jantar Mantar, captioned with date
description: A man holds a microphone and speaks to the camera surrounded by others; an on-screen caption reads "Jantar mantar 20th July."

title: Video titled "Lathi Charge at CJP Jantar Mantar Protest"
description: A man gestures and speaks directly to camera on a street near Jantar Mantar, introduced by an on-screen title card reading "Lathi Charge at CJP Jantar Mantar Protest."

title: Screen recording showing a photo of a bruised, scratched torso
description: A screen recording shows someone scrolling through a photo of a bruised and scratched chest and shoulder with small puncture marks.

title: Crying woman has her face wiped by a bystander
description: A young woman cries as someone wipes her face with a cloth; a person nearby appears to be helping her.

title: Caption alleges Delhi Police beat students indiscriminately
description: Police officers, some in helmets, are clustered near a fence amid a crowd; on-screen text alleges Delhi Police "brutally beat the students" without regard for the safety of girls and children present.

title: Caption claims "media is hiding the truth" amid a crowd scene
description: A man in a pink shirt walks through a crowd of people near a low wall; on-screen text reads "Media is hiding the truth. Watch the real story here!"

title: Caption alleges women dragged and demands student release, Mumbai Police visible
description: A police officer wearing a "Mumbai Police" rain jacket stands amid a crowd; on-screen text alleges women are being dragged on the street and demands the immediate release of detained students with access to lawyers.

title: Police officer pushes a person against a vehicle door
description: A police officer in beige uniform pushes a person against the open door of a vehicle while others look on; a broken-heart emoji is overlaid on the clip.

title: News footage: "A Friend Took the Blows to Protect Him" at Jantar Mantar
description: A paramilitary officer in riot gear stands beside a damaged car amid a crowd of police at Jantar Mantar; the clip carries a "Bhagya Vidhata" news bug and the headline "A Friend Took the Blows to Protect Him — Jantar Mantar video draws Nationwide Attention."

title: Caption accuses Delhi Police of 'shameful act' against a girl at Jantar Mantar
description: A police officer bends over a person on the ground near yellow barricades as a woman stands nearby; on-screen Hindi text criticizes the Modi government, quotes a headline about protesters being removed from Jantar Mantar amid heavy tension, and accuses Delhi Police of a "shameful act" against a girl.

title: Instagram repost: "Women's are safe?" — 20 July, Jantar Mantar
description: Police and paramilitary personnel with batons stand around a crouching, distressed woman; the clip is captioned "WOMEN'S ARE SAFE? 20 July Jantar Mantar" and carries the Instagram handle @pradesh_ki_baatein.

title: Two men stand near a barricade in the aftermath
description: Two men stand talking near a yellow barricade on a debris-strewn street, in what appears to be a quieter moment after the main confrontation.

title: News footage names officer, alleges he slapped a woman
description: A police officer is shown in close-up; the clip carries a "City Samachar Live" news bug, a Delhi location tag, on-screen text asking "What is this Police Official doing?", naming him "Sandeep Lamba," and a Hindi caption alleging a male police officer slapped a woman.

title: Young person recounts going to support the protest
description: A young person looks anxious amid a crowd, with a suitcase and others nearby; on-screen Hindi text reads "Thought I'd go there once, to support" (a first-person account of joining the protest).

title: Caption alleges "police thuggery" at Jantar Mantar, Delhi
description: Men in an alley attend to another man's hand, wrapping it with cloth, near a shuttered shopfront; on-screen text reads "Police thuggery — Jantar Mantar Delhi."

title: Police officers surround a person lying on the pavement
description: A group of police officers stand around a person lying on patterned pavement outside a building entrance.

title: Delhi Police buses lined up along a sidewalk
description: Delhi Police buses are parked along a tree-lined sidewalk with officers standing nearby; on-screen text asks viewers to download and keep the video and follow the poster's backup account in case it is removed.

title: Woman gives an account to camera, indoors
description: A woman with long hair speaks to the camera in an indoor setting, appearing to give her account of events.

title: Bearded man gives an account indoors
description: A bearded man in a plaid shirt speaks close to the camera against a plain yellow wall, apparently recounting his experience.

title: "Indore Insight" branded clip of the crowd
description: A crowd of men stands on a tree-lined street; the clip carries an "Indore Insight" text overlay.

title: Police officer strikes a person lying on the ground with a stick
description: A police officer swings a long stick at a person lying on the ground amid scattered debris and a backpack, while other officers' legs are visible nearby.

title: Young person shows a bruise on the arm
description: A young person holds a water bottle, showing a bruise or mark on the forearm, while sitting near a green fence and plants.

title: Caption alleges police "crossed all limits"; person covered with white cloth
description: A person lies covered with a white cloth on the ground amid foliage, with others attending nearby; on-screen Hindi text says "Police crossed all limits of shamelessness."

title: Riot police advance past a restaurant storefront amid a cleared street
description: Paramilitary personnel in riot gear with shields advance along a debris-strewn commercial street lined with restaurant signage, as a woman nearby reacts and a man carries a large panel.

title: Caption sarcastically thanks "Delhi Police" over close-up of a man's head
description: A close-up shows the back of a man's head as a hand reaches toward it; on-screen text reads "Delhi Police Aapki Seva me" ("Delhi Police, at your service"), used sarcastically.

title: Police officers and bystanders run through a grassy area
description: Police officers with face coverings run through a grassy, tree-lined area near parked buses, alongside a woman also running.

title: Police line a debris-strewn street as smoke rises
description: Police officers stand in a line across a debris-strewn street as a plume of smoke rises in the background; bystanders photograph the scene on their phones.

title: Caption alleges Delhi Police didn't spare a 14-year-old girl
description: A girl wearing a teal head covering and a "Cockroach Janta Party" badge looks to the side; on-screen text states "Delhi Police didn't even spare a 14-year-old girl."

title: News Pinch footage: woman leans on a car hood amid a crowd
description: A woman leans against the hood of a red car surrounded by a crowd near a green-netted fence; the clip carries a "News Pinch" logo.

title: Man runs past riot police amid a chaotic scene; partial caption visible
description: A man with a backpack runs past a paramilitary officer amid a chaotic street scene with people scattering; a partial red caption is visible on screen.

title: Man lies motionless on the ground amid smoke
description: A man lies face-down and motionless on the ground in a haze of smoke, with a phone in his outstretched hand; a bystander nearby films the scene.

title: Crowd and police on a tree-lined street
description: A crowd of people and police in mixed uniforms move along a tree-lined street amid a tense standoff.

title: Riot police strike overturned barricades amid a dense crowd
description: Riot police in blue camouflage swing batons at overturned yellow Delhi Police barricades beside a dense crowd, one of whom has a bandage wrapped around his head.

title: Police stand on a quiet street in the evening aftermath
description: Several police and paramilitary officers stand talking on an emptied street at dusk, with a tour bus passing in the background.

title: Reddit repost: crowd scene near an entrance gate
description: A blurred, fast-moving shot shows a dense crowd near a gated entrance; the filename indicates this was saved from a Reddit post describing "several peaceful [protesters]" at the scene.

title: Reddit repost: woman covers interviewee's mouth near a press microphone
description: A woman puts her hand over another woman's mouth beside a bus as a press microphone is held up nearby; the filename indicates this was saved from a Reddit post alleging Delhi Police tore a young woman's clothes.

title: News interview: caption states "police hit the girl"
description: A reporter holds a branded microphone up to interview people in a dense crowd; on-screen Hindi text states "Police hit the girl."
